annotation.technical_notes: A single custom wave is rendered in the center of a dark void, with a high decay rate preventing any frame feedback or persistent trails in sampler_main. The shape's geometry and scale are modulated by the mid and treble frequencies of the music, while discrete beat-gated bursts trigger momentary color shifts and expansions. The color of the central element cycles through a basic hue rotation over time.

compatibility.note: capture was thin (346877 bytes); below the 500KB threshold — likely butterchurn compatibility gap
